data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Secure data transmission using SSL/TLS encryption.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web application attacks.
data.technical_spec: Possibly utilizes WAF services from providers like Imperva or AWS Shield.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs DDoS protection mechanisms provided by large-scale cloud providers.

data.title: Incident Response
data.description: Prepares to address security breaches promptly.
data.technical_spec: May include automated alerts and a dedicated incident response team.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security reviews to find vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party audits are performed regularly.
